summary: Iteration 20: Unsubscribe/Afmelden Feature (AVG/GDPR Compliance) - ALL TESTS PASSED (12/12 backend, 100% frontend)
critical_code_review_comments: csv_import.py lines 69-78: Secure token generation using SHA256 with secret prefix - correctly implements deterministic unsubscribe tokens
csv_import.py lines 81-99: append_unsub_footer() and append_unsub_text() correctly inject unsubscribe links before </body> or at end
csv_import.py lines 523-568: Unsubscribe endpoint validates token-email match, handles already-unsubscribed case, returns branded HTML
csv_import.py lines 572-590: unsubscribe-stats endpoint provides total_unsubscribed and recent list for dashboard
MarketingCommandCenter.jsx lines 36-44: fetchUnsubStats() correctly called on mount to populate dashboard
MarketingCommandCenter.jsx lines 273-283: 5th stat card correctly displays 'Uitgeschreven' count with Mail icon
MarketingCommandCenter.jsx lines 570-573: Sources overview shows 'afgemeld' count per source
MarketingCommandCenter.jsx lines 615-621: Queue list shows 'Afgemeld' status badge for unsubscribed contacts

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all UI elements and unsubscribe pages verified)

seed_data_creation: Used existing unsubscribed contact (juul.crompvoets@gmail.com) for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Unsubscribe feature fully working. Token = SHA256(droomvriendjes_unsub_2026:email)[:32]. Dashboard shows 1 unsubscribed contact. Sources overview shows '1 afgemeld' for zonnepanelen_leads source. Campaign endpoint only selects contacts with status='pending', automatically excluding unsubscribed. Unsubscribe HTML pages are branded with Droomvriendjes theme.

unsubscribe_endpoint_valid_token.details: GET /api/email/csv/unsubscribe/{token}?email=... returns branded HTML confirmation page

unsubscribe_already_unsubscribed.details: Already unsubscribed contact shows 'Je was al uitgeschreven' page with green checkmark

unsubscribe_invalid_token_400.details: Invalid token returns 400 with error HTML page showing 'Ongeldige uitschrijflink'

unsubscribe_stats_endpoint.details: GET /api/email/csv/unsubscribe-stats returns total_unsubscribed=1 and recent list

frontend_afgemeld_in_sources.details: Sources overview shows '1 afgemeld' for zonnepanelen_leads

frontend_afgemeld_status_label.details: Queue list shows 'Afgemeld' status label for unsubscribed contacts

token_generation_consistent.details: Token generation matches known value and is deterministic

queue_stats_includes_unsubscribed.details: Queue stats endpoint includes unsubscribed count per source

campaign_excludes_unsubscribed.details: Campaign send only targets status='pending' contacts, automatically excluding unsubscribed
